title: senecio hydrophilus
intro: Senecio hydrophilus, also known as ragwort or water ragwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Senecio hydrophilus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or internally to promote overall well-being.
